历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13647 → 15251 → 15469 → 21997 → 18888, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, it dropped sharply to about 22000, then rebounded significantly to about 18888 in 2025, with large fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 18888. The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei for Physics Category was 14 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 22 in 2024, 18 in 2025, and 18 in 2026, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 79th, with a stable ranking in the 75–80 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally. Its reputation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. On Douyin, its school popularity ranking is 70th, rated as average, with moderate short video platform exposure and no abnormal signals in application popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Psychology received A+ (top in the country), Marxist Theory received A, Physical Education received A-, and Education received A-, highlighting strong performance in teacher training and psychology disciplines, which positively attracts applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among Physics Category-related majors, Electronic Information/Communication and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended directions for 2024–2026. Computer Science remains recommended but with cooling popularity. Teacher training/education majors show divergence and wait-and-see attitudes. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hubei is about 240,000 (a decrease of about 3.9% from about 250,000 in 2025), with a slight reduction in candidate scale and a slight easing of competition pressure. The provincial control line for the 2025 undergraduate batch is 426 points, down from 437 points in 2024, indicating possible adjustments in exam difficulty. South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, a first-tier city, which has some cross-provincial appeal to Hubei candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Hubei is small (about 18 people), with a low enrollment proportion, so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of about 18888, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a 3.9% decrease in Hubei Physics Category examinees slightly easing competition, and a neutral school reputation with no abnormal signals, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward (smaller number, easier admission). The predicted minimum ranking is about 18688, with a range of 18188–19188.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 18000), focus on applying for popular majors like Mathematics and Applied Mathematics and Network Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., above 19000), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety to avoid the risk of slipping.
